name: voice-ai-pipecat
description: Voice AI assistant: Pipecat + Gemini 2.5 Flash + local faster-whisper STT + Piper TTS

variables.name: AUDIO_INPUT_DEVICE
variables.description: PyAudio input device index for the local mic, or 'default'. main.py logs the enumeration on startup so you can pick the right index for your USB mic.

variables.name: AUDIO_OUTPUT_DEVICE
variables.description: PyAudio output device index for the local speaker, or 'default'.

variables.name: WAKE_WORD_MODELS
variables.description: Comma-separated openWakeWord models to listen for. Pretrained options: alexa, hey_jarvis, hey_mycroft, hey_rhasspy, ok_nabu. Custom 'Hey Wendy' requires training a model.

variables.name: WAKE_WORD_THRESHOLD
variables.description: Detection confidence (0.0 to 1.0). Lower = more sensitive but more false triggers.

variables.name: WAKE_LISTEN_SECS
variables.description: Max seconds to keep the mic open after the wake word fires before auto-closing.

variables.name: LOCAL_LLM_MODEL
variables.description: Ollama model to pull on first container start (e.g. qwen2.5:3b, llama3.2:3b, qwen2.5:7b). Empty = don't pull (cloud LLM only). Targets Jetson with the gpu entitlement.
variables.prompt: Local LLM model (Ollama tag, blank to skip)
